name: suede_stems
description: Suede Labs basic 2-track stems separation for agents, content creators, podcasters, video editors, karaoke producers, DJs, and lightweight AI music pipelines that need a fast and inexpensive split of an audio file into two complementary stems. Two modes: vocal/instrumental (most common, ideal for karaoke, remix beds, lyric video production, and content creation) or drum/other (useful for DJ mashups, sample isolation, and beat replacement). Distinct from the pro 4-track service: optimized for speed and cost over surgical fidelity. Built for paid x402/ACP agent commerce.

audio_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of the source audio file to separate. Supports mp3, wav, flac, m4a, and ogg up to 15 minutes long.

mode.description: Split mode. vocal_inst returns isolated vocals plus full instrumental bed. drum_other returns isolated drums plus everything else.

output_format.description: Audio format for the returned stems.
